title: MrSammich's Better Tools
description: Upgrades all the metal tools & weapons with shinier textures and tools grips, similar to Netherite Tools.
body:
This pack updates all the metal tools and weapons' textures except for netherite.
All of the metal tools have a similar texture to netherite tools (except for netherite, OBVIOUSLY). 
  This pack cannot be paired with other Resource Packs that change tool appearances, like Bare Bones.

UPDATE!
  All metals (Diamond, Iron, Gold, and Copper) have new textures for their ingots and nuggets. Fishing rods and tipped arrows now have a texture to match the new stick design.
